data.notes:
Whole gate assembly removed
Installed new gate assembly 
Gate cylinder removed
Installed new gate cylinder 
Calibrated gate.
Removed PMT S/N:2123
Installed PMT S/N:851
Installed new gate door switch onto gate since it was faulty. 
Level probe controller S/N:73988444 removed fault giving a EC003 alarm. 
Installed level probe controller S/N:44841248. 
Adjusted settings in high and low and tested with feed. 
Footprint and alignment of x-rays checked.
Calibrated sorter.
Tracer test conducted

Channel 2 completely dead.
Checked for loose connections.
Found Molec pins pulls out on 5-pin connector.
Replaced connector. 
Loose wire on Channel 3 repaired causing ejector alarm.
Replaced Channel card 2 S/N:IN2002050100 due to fluctuating in HTS.
Sorter then calibrated.
Tracer test was conducted.
Observed while production was running.

data.notes:
HT but no signal channel 4.
Swapped HT cable of PMT1 and 4 fault still present.
Swapped HT Supply of PMT1 and 4 fault persisted.
Checked for any visual damages or loose cables.
Tested Coex cable on Channel 4 and failed.
Replaced Coex cable on PMT 4 fault resolved. 
Tracer test conducted.

Fault: high offset channel 4
Found loose connection on Signal cable on PM Box. 
Further inspection found base on Channel 4 to have burn/arcing marks on connections. 
Bases 1,2,6 also needs replacing due to same features as described on Channel 4 base. 
Went through all connections. 
Rested all the wiring for continuity and none tested through.
Sorter was then calibrated 
Red Artist Plastic also replaced due to wear. 
Tracer test was conducted.
Ejector Block is due for service exchange
